name: Shipwrecked
description: This model gains the following trigger on all actions printed on its stat card:

granted_triggers.name: Drowning Tide
granted_triggers.text: This trigger must be declared, if able. Immediately, this action fails. This model gains an enemy Aura (Hazardous) token. This model may discard a card to discard this upgrade.
granted_triggers.applies_to: all actions printed on its stat card

extraction_notes: Trigger has asterisk (*) indicating it is mandatory
Timing is 'When Declaring' based on 'This trigger must be declared, if able'
The action fails immediately upon declaring this trigger
